search_terms_used: patellofemoral pain syndrome runners biomechanics systematic review pubmed
running knee injury systematic review meta-analysis pubmed
patellofemoral pain risk factors runners meta-analysis pubmed
iliotibial band syndrome runners treatment evidence pubmed
ITBS conservative treatment running systematic review pubmed
patellofemoral pain running load management evidence pubmed
coverage_notes: Strong coverage: PFPS well covered with biomechanics SR (Neal 2016), risk factors meta (Neal 2019), running-specific knee injury SR (Alexander 2022), contemporary management (Esculier 2020). ITBS covered with runners-specific SR (van der Worp 2012), conservative treatment SR (Sanchez-Alvarado 2024), rehab RCT (McKay 2020), and treatment targets review (Friede 2022). Good balance of both major runner knee pathologies.

papers.title: Runners with patellofemoral pain have altered biomechanics which targeted interventions can modify: A systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed biomechanical differences in runners with PFP vs controls, identifying modifiable factors including hip adduction, contralateral pelvic drop, and rearfoot eversion.

papers.title: Infographic. Running myths: common beliefs about running and knee osteoarthritis and patellofemoral pain
papers.notes: Systematic review addressing common myths about running and knee health, synthesizing evidence on running, knee OA risk, and patellofemoral pain.

papers.title: Risk factors for patellofemoral pain: a systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed prospective studies identifying risk factors for developing patellofemoral pain, including quadriceps weakness and increased knee valgus.

papers.title: A Contemporary Approach to Patellofemoral Pain in Runners
papers.notes: Contemporary evidence-based approach to managing PFP in runners, emphasizing load management, activity modification, and graduated return to running.

papers.title: Conservative Treatment of Iliotibial Band Syndrome: A Systematic Review
papers.journal: Frontiers in Sports and Active Living
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed conservative treatment approaches for ITBS including exercise therapy, manual therapy, and combined interventions.

papers.title: Iliotibial band syndrome in runners: a systematic review
papers.notes: Comprehensive systematic review of ITBS in runners covering etiology, risk factors, prevention, and treatment evidence.

papers.title: Iliotibial band syndrome rehabilitation in female runners: a pilot randomized study
papers.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
papers.notes: Pilot RCT comparing hip strengthening plus conventional treatment vs conventional treatment alone for ITBS in female runners.

papers.title: Therapeutic targets for iliotibial band syndrome: A scoping review
papers.notes: Scoping review identifying therapeutic targets for ITBS including hip abductor strengthening, ITB flexibility, and running gait modification.
